_note: Read-only seed for the self-improving flag matcher (flag_corpus.py). The first block transcribes autoflag.py's admitted-error regexes into canonical phrasings; the second block adds full-length conversational admissions (concessions the rigid regex misses), validated against real sessions — short synthetic phrasings barely overlap real long sentences, so a fork's cold-start floor needs realistic-length entries to fire at all. The live corpus at ~/.claude/flag-corpus.json grows from here at mine-time; this file is never written. All entries are generic/domain-neutral — no source-session specifics.
